calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant O'Conner's claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release the $618.02 and whatever other sums that it is currently holding to the plaintiff creditor. $100 per pay period ($200 per month) shall be withheld from defendant's pay and shall be remitted to plaintiff creditor.

Order signed.

Copies of order mailed out to parties and Sacramento County Sheriff's Office on July 25, 2022.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
